name: Deeja | Strange argonian encounter
description:
"Call Deeja beautiful one more time..."

So you and buddy were walking throught forest untill he cought attention of Deeja with his stupid words. Now you are pinned to the rock.

Yappers.

Funny bot, hehehe. Idk about Skyrim lore or something like that, so sorry if I gave her wrong ocupation.
